final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: orb icon/texture set for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate icon sheet for six match-3 board orb types. Subject: six circular orb icons in a clean 3x2 sheet: fire, ice, earth, heart, armor, gold. Each orb should have distinct symbol language and color while sharing the same beveled jewel style. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game icons, crisp mobile readability, fantasy gem/orb materials. Composition/framing: 3x2 sheet, equal-size icons, centered in cells, transparent-background cutout feel, no labels. Lighting/mood: bright readable gameplay pieces with strong silhouettes. Color palette: fire ruby/orange, ice cyan/blue, earth moss/green, heart rose, armor silver, gold yellow. Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no casino imagery, no gore, avoid tiny detail; each orb must read at small board scale.
